falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern match would be broken, as that bottom formation featured lower highs and failed recovery attempts below prior resistance; a clean breakout above 5,600 invalidates the structural similarity and suggests accumulation rather than distribution

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 14.00 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 41 implies elevated fear/uncertainty; sustained VIX compression below 14 would indicate fear has fully dissipated, contradicting the bottoming narrative where volatility remains sticky during base-building

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield breaks above 4.50% and holds above it for 2 consecutive closes
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern coincided with rate stabilization/falling yields; a sharp yield spike above 4.50% would signal a new macro driver (inflation re-acceleration or Fed hawkishness) that destroys the parallel to August 2024's disinflationary relief rally

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
